exercises.title: Circuit Composition
exercises.starterCode:
class MiniCircuit:
    def __init__(self, n):
        self.n = n
        self.ops = []

    def add(self, gate, qubits):
        self.ops.append((gate, qubits))
        return self

    def compose(self, other, qubit_map=None):
        # Your code
        pass

c1 = MiniCircuit(2)
c1.add('H', [0])
c2 = MiniCircuit(1)
c2.add('X', [0])
c1.compose(c2, [1])
print(c1.ops)

testCases.input: H on q0, then X on q1
